headline: Does PrognoCIS’ New PrognoPay Integration Deepen Global Payments’ Embedded Healthcare Strategy For GPN?
summary: In May 2026, PrognoCIS announced it had launched PrognoPay, an embedded payment solution inside its EHR platform powered by Global Payments, enabling healthcare practices to process patient payments directly within clinical and administrative workflows. This integration brings Global Payments’ enterprise-grade, healthcare-tailored payment capabilities deeper into everyday provider and patient interactions, potentially reinforcing its role in embedded, software-led payments. Next, we will...
